name: iris-external-reg
description: Workflow and reference pack for developing third-party appointment registration integrations on IRIS, including document handoff through extract-doc, implementation planning, ObjectScript development guidance, RegInterface mapping, and verification.
defaultPrompt: Use iris-external-reg to prepare a third-party appointment registration integration plan
Ingest this appointment registration interface document with extract-doc, then generate the execution plan
Implement RegInterface methods according to the confirmed execution plan
Review this external registration implementation against RegInterface rules
